arts.ttl: Newcastle United drop new stadium hint after 2025 spending spree question
arts.sum: When asked if he dreamed of the day that Newcastle can get more use out of the Saudi millions in the background at St James' Park, Howe pointed to the club's off-field operations team on the ground on Tyneside. When asked if Newcastle could repeat the Anderson sale and sell an up and coming star like Lewis Miley, Howe replied: "The last thing we want to do, or I want to do as the manager of the club, is to sell academy products who have the potential to play for this team for many years.

arts.ttl: The stunning transformation of Alexander Isak from shy teenager to ruthless goalscorer
arts.sum: The Newcastle striker and Sweden international initially struggled at Borussia Dortmund after leaving hometown club AIK before growing into one of the best goalscorers in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's strong 'waste of energy' response after Carragher, Sutton and Sherwood claims
arts.sum: There is a lot of football left to play, of course, in the second half of the campaign but Newcastle's form has been such that Jamie Carragher has backed the Magpies to finish in fifth place in his revised season predictions after the Liverpool legend previously claimed that Howe's team would not be a European contender. Newcastle, in the process, have closed the gap on fourth-placed Chelsea and the Magpies could leapfrog the Blues in the table with a win against Wolves tonight.

arts.ttl: What fresh £12.5m boost means for Newcastle United as PIF make another move
arts.sum: PIF made a similar move back in November, one of several done throughout their time as owners of the club, where £35m was provided through a single share issue. The money could have come from either the ultimate owners, the Saudi Arabian Public Investment Fund (PIF), or the Reuben Brothers, although it is anticipated that it arrived from the former.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United transfer negotiations confirmed as owner says 'we're in talks'
arts.sum: Fenerbahce vice president and Hull City owner Acun Ilicali has confirmed that transfer talks have begun between the Turkish club and Newcastle United over the transfer of Lloyd Kelly this winter. Our award-winning The Everything is Black and White Podcast is the go-to Newcastle United show to bring you all the latest news, opinion, analysis and nostalgia about the club.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United facing competition from Aston Villa for £40m rated defender and Almiron latest
arts.sum: Various reports in Spain claim Newcastle United, Liverpool and Aston Villa are keen on signing Sevilla defender Loic Bade this month with Unai Emery's side looking to steal a march. The 24-year-old is valued in the region of €25million (£21million) according to transfermarkt, though various other reports claim the La Liga club could demand a fee in excess of £40million.

arts.ttl: 10 players set to miss Newcastle United clash but Wolves get major injury and illness boost
arts.sum: The five Magpies players could be joined in the stand by others, with boss Eddie Howe still having doubts over Sven Botman, Joe Willock, Jacob Murphy and Alexander Isak, after the quartet missed the FA Cup win over Bromley on Sunday due to niggling injuries, though they are expected to be involved against Wolves. However, Wolves boss Vitor Pereira has revealed that key trio Matheus Cunha, Craig Dawson and Nelson Semedo are all in line to return.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Wolves: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Newcastle take on Wolves in the Premier League on Wednesday night. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: 'It's a cracker' - Osula scores first Newcastle goal
arts.sum: William Osula scores a "rocket" as Newcastle take a 3-1 lead against Bromley in the FA Cup third round.

arts.ttl: 'Dream start!'- Bromley score after eight minutes against Newcastle
arts.sum: Watch League Two Bromley take a shock lead as Cameron Congreve scores within eight minutes against Newcastle United in the FA Cup at St James' Park.
